recommendations.title: Hagazussa
recommendations.overview: In the 15th century, a young goatherd living alone in a mountain hut feels a dark presence in the woods.

recommendations.title: Killer of Sheep
recommendations.overview: An African-American man working at a slaughterhouse in the Watts area of Los Angeles leads a dissatisfied and listless existence.

recommendations.title: Puppy!
recommendations.overview: The residents of Hotel Transylvania find their world turned upside-down when youngster Dennis gets a surprise monster-sized pet.

recommendations.title: Vampire Hunter D
recommendations.overview: In a far-future time ruled by the supernatural, a young girl requests the help of a vampire hunter to kill the vampire who has bitten her and thus prevent her from becoming a vampire herself.

recommendations.title: El Conde
recommendations.overview: After living for over two centuries, Augusto Pinochet is a vampire ready to die… but the vultures around him won't let him go without one last bite.

recommendations.title: Dracula's Daughter
recommendations.overview: A countess from Transylvania seeks a psychiatrist’s help to cure her vampiric cravings.

recommendations.title: Roar
recommendations.overview: Roar follows a family who are attacked by various African animals at the secluded home of their keeper.

recommendations.title: Vampire Sisters 2: Bats in the Belly
recommendations.overview: Teen half vampire Dakaria falls in love with rock singer vampire Murdo. Dakaria, her friends and family have to face vampire Xantor who has dark plans.

recommendations.title: Queen of the Damned
recommendations.overview: Vampire Lestat awakens from his slumber and becomes a rock star. But chaos strikes when his music awakens Akasha, the vampire queen, who may not rest until she makes Lestat her new king.

recommendations.title: Dragon Wars: D-War
recommendations.genres: Fantasy, Drama, Horror, Action, Thriller, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: Ethan learns he carries the spirit of a warrior who battled dragons in 16th-century Korea -- and one day he'll find a tattooed girl carrying the spirit of that warrior's beloved. Years later, he meets Sarah and dragons soon descend on Los Angeles see
